calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn
Appeal as to judgment on plaintiffs claim entered 6-19-18 against appellant/defendant.

Bennie Neely, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf

Representative of Crescent Manor Partners, LP, Jessica Moreno, for Appellant testies.

Appellant examined by Court.
Respondent examined by Court.

The following documentary evidence is introduced on behalf of Respondent and shown to the Court: photos of drain and medical records are marked and admitted and returned to Respondent.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits returned to respective parties.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: D. Feinberg; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To Jun-19-18 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
